Elementos/path.name: path
Elementos/path.description: The<path>SVGelement is the generic element to define a shape. All the basic shapes can be created with a path element.

info.excerpt: The<path>SVGelement is the generic element to define a shape. All the basic shapes can be created with a path element.

Elementos/pattern.name: pattern
Elementos/pattern.description: The<pattern>SVGelement defines a graphics object which can be redrawn at repeated x- and y-coordinate intervals ("tiled") to cover an area.

info.excerpt: The<pattern>SVGelement defines a graphics object which can be redrawn at repeated x- and y-coordinate intervals ("tiled") to cover an area.

Elementos/polygon.name: polygon
Elementos/polygon.description: The<polygon>SVGelement defines a closed shape consisting of a set of connected straight line segments. The last point is connected to the first point.

info.excerpt: The<polygon>SVGelement defines a closed shape consisting of a set of connected straight line segments. The last point is connected to the first point.

Elementos/polyline.name: polyline
Elementos/polyline.description: The<polyline>SVGelement is an SVG basic shape that creates straight lines connecting several points. Typically apolylineis used to create open shapes as the last point doesn't have to be connected to

info.excerpt: The<polyline>SVGelement is an SVG basic shape that creates straight lines connecting several points. Typically apolylineis used to create open shapes as the last point doesn't have to be connected to
